title: Hera hebe
taxonomy: Hera hebe is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Plantaginaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has about 70 species. The genus is also known as the New Zealand hebe. Hera hebe species are shrubs or small trees that are often used as ornamental plants. They have small, bell-shaped flowers that are typically blue or white in color.
